title: Goal
description: RFC 0097 Â§B. A standing goal â€” a durable objective with explicit completion criteria, evaluated by a host-side judge (RFC 0090 verifier verdict or an opaque host evaluator), that keeps an agent working across turns and runs until the judge is satisfied, a declared RFC 0058 bound is crossed, or the agent escalates (RFC 0044). Completion MUST be the judge's verdict â€” a client MUST NOT set `state: satisfied` directly. Continuation MUST be bounded. `objective` and any verdict payload are SR-1 redaction-safe. Gated on the `agents.goals` capability.

objective.description: The standing objective. SR-1 redaction-safe â€” no secrets/PII.

state.description: Lifecycle state. `satisfied` is set ONLY by the host on a judge verdict, never by a client. `bound-exceeded` is set when a declared bound is crossed; `escalated` when an RFC 0044 confidence-escalation interrupt fires against the goal; `abandoned` on explicit abandon.

completion.description: How the goal's completion is judged.

check.description: `verifier`: completion is an RFC 0090 verifier verdict. `host`: an opaque host evaluator.

lastVerdict.description: Most recent judge verdict. Content-free re: objective text. Non-deterministic judge output â€” MUST be persisted (carried in the `goal.evaluated` event / checkpoint) and never recomputed on replay/fork.

runId.description: The run this verdict evaluated (RFC 0040 causation-compatible).

continuation.description: How the goal re-engages work between judge checks.

armRef.description: The RFC 0052 job / RFC 0068 commitment / RFC 0060 heartbeat that re-engages work for this goal.

bounds.description: RFC 0058 execution bounds. The host MUST stop continuation and set `state: bound-exceeded` when any declared bound is crossed. When `agents.goals.requiresBounds` is true, at least one bound MUST be present before the goal may activate.

maxLoopIterations.description: RFC 0058. Max contributing iterations before the goal is bound-exceeded.

runTimeoutMs.description: RFC 0058. Wall-clock deadline (ms) for the standing goal.

maxCostUsd.description: RFC 0084. Accumulated cost ceiling across contributing runs.

owner.description: RFC 0048 identity triple. Redaction-safe â€” `principal` is an opaque id, never PII or credential material.
